utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each is fully specified with details and costs (both monthly and annual where relevant). Health coverage includes physical and mental health insurance with clear costs, property coverage includes home/contents insurance with clear costs, travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs, additional services are listed with note on cost inclusion, and total budget provides monthly/annual breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main policy components: (1) Health coverage from 'LifeFirst / HealthFirst'; (2) Property coverage from 'HealthFirst'; and (3) Travel coverage from 'LifeFirst / HealthFirst'. According to the ground-truth list, the closest matches are the standard plans with the same providers. For health coverage, this corresponds to both 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9) and 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' (rating 7). For property coverage, 'HealthFirst' corresponds to 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9). For travel coverage, the 'LifeFirst / HealthFirst' combination aligns most closely with 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9) for travel insurance, since HealthFirst is not listed under mobility coverage. The additional services listed (telemedicine, wellness, gym reimbursement, premium medical network) already exist in enhancement services with known ratings: Telemedicine Services (rating 10), Wellness Programs (rating 3), Gym Membership Reimbursement (rating 2), and Premium Medical Network (rating 7). Therefore, these are mapped accordingly.
